title: Product Brief
description: Normalized product brief for one GTM research target. Loop 0 writes it from the user's free-form input to gtm_scout_memory/briefs/<brief_id>.json (one file per product). All downstream loops read it for ICP relevance, channel mix, and budget allocation.

brief_id.description: Stable slug of the product name (e.g. 'ai-stock-signals').

product_kind.description: Coarse kind; biases channel mix (e.g. mobile_app -> ASO, investment_product -> compliance-aware channels).

icp.description: What the USER provided up front; Loop 1 enriches and writes the full ICP to icp.json.

target_customer.description: Free-text target customer profile as provided.

amount_usd.description: Numeric budget; null if not provided.

raw.description: Verbatim budget string from the brief (e.g. '$2,000/month').

kind.description: Coarse objective kind; drives default budget split in policies/scoring.json.

competitors_seed.description: User-named competitors, if any. Loop 2 expands this.
